Black Friday is Back: Save 70% on MonsterInsights! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..OHU-pmDYNB4ubXOKJ8RKYuVKttydGmoqpnXbmEndhHA )

Hey Muhammad,

This is your absolute last chance to save 70% on MonsterInsights
Pro during our once-a-year Black Friday sale.

👉 Last chance to get 70% off MonsterInsights 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..OHU-pmDYNB4ubXOKJ8RKYuVKttydGmoqpnXbmEndhHA )

If you’ve been dragging your feet, don’t wait any longer or
you’ll miss it!

Special pricing ends tonight at 11:59pm EST.

Hurry!
Jolissa Skow
MonsterInsights Product Educator

*Discount applies to new purchases and upgrades only.
